name: co-design
description: Design and UX workflow variant for UI/UX design, design systems, prototyping, and design handoff. Includes specialized design agents covering visual design, service design, UX research, and prototyping.

agent_manifest.notes: storyteller: skip for purely functional/technical design work. typography-expert: skip if font decisions are pre-established by brand guidelines. System skills (agent-lifecycle-manager, platform-command-lifecycle-manager, platform-skill-lifecycle-manager, finishing-a-development-branch) are present in .claude/skills/ and .gemini/skills/ via workspace propagation — intentionally excluded from skills[] as they are workspace-level utilities, not co-design domain skills.
